title: Destruction of Nomad City
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Nomad City}} {{Battle |prev= *[[Mission to Poderis]]''[[The Last Command]]'' *[[Battle of Woostri]] |conc= *[[Battle of Qat Chrystac]] *[[Battle of Ord Mantell (9 ABY)|Battle of Ord Mantell]] |next=[[Skirmish at Chazwa]] |image=[[File:Nomad_city_destroyed.jpg]] |name=Second Battle of Nomad City |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] ([[Thrawn campaign]]) |date=[[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] (44:8:1)''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |place=[[Nkllon/Legends|Nkllon]] |result=Imperial victory |side1=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |side2=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] |commanders2=[[General/Legends|General]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= *3 [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] *6 [[Assault shuttle/Legends|Assault shuttles]] *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] |forces2=Nomad defense fighters |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Unknown, presumed light |casual2=*Resources *Nomad City *All defense fighters *All but one shieldship damaged or destroyed |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I'd still recommend, sir, that the attack be carried out as soon as possible.''"
"''Recommendation noted, Captain. And, as it happens, already acted upon. The raid was launched ten minutes ago.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]] and [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]|}} The '''Second Battle of Nomad City''' was a raid launched by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] to supply his [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] in the [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi system]] with much-needed [[hfredium]] and [[Kammris/Legends|kammris]]. ==The battle== Thrawn sent three [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruisers]] to acquire them; after cutting off communications in [[Nomad City]], and disabling both the city and its accompanying [[shieldship]]s, Thrawn received large amounts of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and four months worth of supplies. ==Aftermath== The mobile city was disabled, and was unable to get away from the oncoming and deadly sunrise of [[Nkllon/Legends|Nkllon]]. However, the [[Peregrine (Dreadnaught-class)|''Peregrine'']] arrived, commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]. Bel Iblis' forces helped evacuate the citizens of Nomad City. Bel Iblis and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] asked Admiral [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]] to lend part of his fleet to save the city, but Drayson refused. Nomad City was nevertheless rescued and repaired, only for Lando to lose it in a Sabacc game. ==Appearances== *''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} *[[The Last Command 2|''The Last Command'' 2]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Thrawn}} {{Interlang |de=Zweite Schlacht von Nkllon |es=Destrucción de Ciudad Nómada }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Nomad City, Destruction of}} [[Category:Battles of Nkllon]] [[Category:Battles of the Thrawn campaign]]
